headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Equinix (EQIX) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: For investors considering whether Equinix, at around US$1,094 per share, still offers value or whether most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price, this article focuses on what that price might represent for you. Over the short term, the stock shows returns of 3.5% over 7 days and 14.1% over 30 days. Year to date it sits at 43.2%, and 41.5% over the past year, which may have shifted how some investors think about its risk and reward trade off. Recent attention on data center...
